calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,240p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"uv run fedcourts paths --court ca11 --docket 68975767 --event evt-motion-correct-in-dc-15","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court ca11 --docket 68975767 --event evt-motion-correct-in-dc-15","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"find . -path ./.git -prune -o -type f \\( -path '*68975767*' -o -path '*/record/*' \\) -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' data/cases/ca11/68975767/events/evt-motion-correct-in-dc-15/event.yaml && sed -n '1,360p' data/cases/ca11/68975767/record/snapshots/2026-07-11.json && if [ -d data/cases/ca11/68975767/record/documents ]; then find data/cases/ca11/68975767/record/documents -maxdepth 1 -type f -print -exec sed -n '1,240p' {} \\;; fi && sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/ca11/68975767/record/context.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq '{id, docket_number, docket_number_core, case_name, court_id, date_filed, date_terminated, appellate_fee_status, originating_court: .appeal_from_str, judges: [.assigned_to_str], parties, entries: [.docket_entries[] | {entry_number, date_filed, description}]}' data/cases/ca11/68975767/record/snapshots/2026-07-11.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ && git status --short -- data/cases/ca11/68975767/events/evt-motion-correct-in-dc-15","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"git status --short && find data/cases/ca11/68975767/events/evt-motion-correct-in-dc-15/predictions/codex-baseline/20260711T091155Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\\n' | sort && jq -e '.case_id == \"ca11/68975767\" and .event_id == \"evt-motion-correct-in-dc-15\" and .predictor_id == \"codex-baseline\" and .run_id == \"20260711T091155Z\" and .model == \"gpt-5.6-sol\" and .engine == \"codex\"' data/cases/ca11/68975767/events/evt-motion-correct-in-dc-15/pr
